conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales executive

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India.

## Role Overview
We're looking for a results-driven sales professional to drive business growth and build strong client relationships.

## Key Responsibilities
• Generate leads and convert prospects into customers through calls, emails, and meetings.
• Maintain and grow relationships with existing clients.
• Prepare and deliver presentations, proposals, and negotiated quotes.
• Collaborate with marketing and product teams to tailor solutions for customers.
• Track sales activities and update CRM.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Sales and negotiation skills
• Customer relationship management skills
• Target achievement mindset
• Communication skills
• CRM skills

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Excellent communication skills
• CRM usage (e.g., Salesforce, Zoho)
• Basic MS Excel skills

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate is results-driven, collaborative, and has a strong target achievement mindset.

## Success Metrics
• 30-day milestone: Build a pipeline of potential clients
• 90-day milestone: Achieve sales targets and demonstrate sales process adherence
• 6-month milestone: Establish a track record of achieving sales targets and driving business growth

## How to Apply
To apply, submit your application through our website, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications.

conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales Executive

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India. Our platform is designed to provide a seamless and efficient experience for our clients, and we are committed to delivering exceptional service and support. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, we are constantly evolving and improving our platform to meet the changing needs of our clients.

## Role Overview
We're looking for a results-driven sales professional to drive business growth and build strong client relationships. As a sales executive, you will play a key role in identifying new business opportunities, developing and executing sales strategies, and maintaining existing client relationships. You will be responsible for achieving sales targets, expanding our customer base, and contributing to the growth and success of our company.

## Key Responsibilities
• Generate leads and convert prospects into customers through calls, emails, and meetings.
• Maintain and grow relationships with existing clients, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction and loyalty.
• Prepare and deliver presentations, proposals, and negotiated quotes, tailored to meet the specific needs of each client.
• Collaborate with marketing and product teams to develop and implement effective sales strategies and solutions.
• Track sales activities and update CRM, ensuring accurate and up-to-date records of all sales interactions.
• Conduct market research and analysis to identify new business opportunities and stay ahead of industry trends.
• Develop and maintain a deep understanding of our products and services, as well as those of our competitors.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Sales and negotiation skills, with a proven track record of success in a similar role.
• Customer relationship management skills, with the ability to build and maintain strong relationships with clients.
• Target achievement mindset, with a strong focus on achieving sales targets and driving business growth.
• Communication skills, with the ability to effectively communicate with clients, colleagues, and other stakeholders.
• CRM skills, with experience using CRM software to manage sales interactions and track sales performance.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Excellent communication skills, with the ability to craft compelling sales messages and presentations.
• CRM usage (e.g., Salesforce, Zoho), with experience using CRM software to manage sales interactions and track sales performance.
• Basic MS Excel skills, with the ability to analyze data and create reports to inform sales strategies.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate is results-driven, collaborative, and has a strong target achievement mindset. You should be a motivated and ambitious sales professional, with a passion for building strong relationships and driving business growth. You should also be a team player, with the ability to work effectively with colleagues and other stakeholders to achieve shared goals.

## Success Metrics
• 30-day milestone: Build a pipeline of potential clients, with a minimum of 10 new leads and 5 scheduled meetings.
• 90-day milestone: Achieve sales targets and demonstrate sales process adherence, with a minimum of 5 new clients and $10,000 in revenue.
• 6-month milestone: Establish a track record of achieving sales targets and driving business growth, with a minimum of 10 new clients and $50,000 in revenue.

## How to Apply
To apply, submit your application through our website, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications. We offer a competitive salary and benefits package, as well as opportunities for career growth and professional development. If you are a motivated and ambitious sales professional, with a passion for building strong relationships and driving business growth, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.
